headline: Is IDEX Corporation (IEX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is IEX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on IDEX Corporation on Valueinvestorsclub.com by angus309. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on IEX. IDEX Corporation’s share was trading at $214.93 as of May 1st. IEX’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.79 and 26.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. IDEX […]
